title: Participle Clauses
topics: present participle · past participle · perfect participle · position
notes: ⚠️ The subject of both clauses MUST be the same:
✗ Walking down the street, the rain started.
✓ Walking down the street, I got soaked.\n

examples.en: Seeing the danger, she stopped immediately.
Not knowing what to say, he just smiled.
examples.cz: Nevědě, co říct, jen se usmál.

examples.en: She sat at her desk, reading a report.
examples.cz: Seděla u stolu a četla zprávu.

examples.en: The train arriving on platform 3 is delayed.
examples.cz: Vlak přijíždějící na nástupiště 3 má zpoždění.

examples.en: Disappointed by the result, he resigned.
The documents, signed by the manager, were sent.
Given the circumstances, this was the right decision.
examples.cz: Vzhledem k okolnostem to bylo správné rozhodnutí.

examples.en: Having finished the report, she went home.
examples.cz: Poté, co dokončila zprávu, šla domů.

tasks: 2. Write a short news report (8 sentences) using at least 3 participle clauses
3. Find 5 participle clauses in a newspaper article
